untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ranking stocks by 3-12 month historical returns and selecting top/bottom deciles. This is a cross-sectional portfolio construction rule that cannot be expressed as a single-instrument technical condition. The 'returns' indicator available measures recent bar returns, not the 3-12 month formation period ranking required for proper momentum portfolio implementation. Backtest engine must implement decile ranking logic separately.
translation_notes: Original signal: DeBondt & Thaler (1985) reversal strategy using 3-12 month formation period to identify winner/loser portfolios, held for 1 year. Rank-based portfolio selection is not translatable to indicator-based entry/exit rules. Provided placeholder conditions using returns indicator for illustrative purposes only—these do not capture the decile-ranking methodology essential to the strategy.
